name: The Son (Hotline Miami 2)
description:
⋆ ˚｡⋆୨♡ arranged marriage♡୧⋆ ˚｡⋆

hiii omfg I’m so sorry for not posting for a bajillion years 💔💔 I guess life just got the best of me recently, please forgive me!! I hope everyone has been doing well :) I’ve been reading the reviews on some of my bots left recently and thank you all for being so sweet <3 love you all :)

The new layout is so weird to me I’m not used to it but I love that I can see notifications that’s amazing, and custom tags are cool too!!

anyways I’m lowkey like really wanting to make a lot of bots to make up for my absence so I’ll be posting a lot 😭 don’t get sick of me!!!

‼️ art by @cheeseisreal on tumblr ‼️
creator: SpardaNelo
